name: aegis-qvac
description: Aegis — a fully on-device, private health companion built on the QVAC SDK + MedPsy. Research/education use only; not a medical device.
//deps-note: On Expo/iOS we use the high-level @qvac/sdk functions (ocr/embed/ragSearch/transcribe), not the low-level @qvac/*-onnx Bare addon classes. The Expo app (app/) adds react-native-bare-kit, bare-rpc, bare-pack + expo-* deps — see docs/QVAC_API.md. Pin a current @qvac/sdk version (API ref is v0.11.x).
